assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and an email address or Indian mobile number as required by signup.
No Razorpay account, KYC submission, or Test Mode API keys exist yet.
Test Mode first success is acceptable while KYC is pending.

developer_goal: Create a Razorpay account and complete the earliest official Test Mode first-success path for a chosen product and integration.

first_success.outcome: Unresolved among Payment Links, Payment Gateway web Checkout variants, subscriptions, plugins, and other product-specific Test Mode terminals.
first_success.observable_signal: Quickstart requires product selection before integration and names successful Test Mode use without one universal transaction terminal.

route_selection.surface: Razorpay Payments Quickstart plus Dashboard Test Mode
route_selection.rule: Select the shortest complete account-to-Test-Mode-success route only after product, integration method, and business onboarding branch are fixed.

candidates.name: Payment Gateway Standard Checkout web integration
candidates.reason: A common developer path, but Quickstart presents it as one of several product and coding-requirement options.

candidates.name: Payment Gateway Quick Integration
candidates.reason: Official docs offer a separate quick-integration guide that may differ in steps from Standard Checkout.

candidates.name: No-code Payment Links or industry/platform plugins
candidates.reason: Quickstart explicitly offers no-code and platform-plugin routes with different first-success mechanics.

candidates.name: Subscriptions or other product families
candidates.reason: Quickstart routes SaaS and other industries to product-specific solutions with different terminals.

required_path.action: Sign up for a Razorpay account and complete the onboarding branch required for the business type.

required_fields.label: Signup identifier and password or OTP challenges
required_fields.notes: Quickstart and set-up docs confirm account creation and KYC, but exact live signup controls were not inventory-verified in this audit.

required_fields.label: Registered versus unregistered business details and KYC inputs
required_fields.notes: Business-type branches change required documents and forms.

required_path.observable_result: The developer can open the Dashboard in Test Mode.

required_path.action: Select the Razorpay product and integration method that matches the business.
required_path.observable_result: One product and integration guide becomes the measured route.

required_path.action: Generate Test Mode API keys when the selected route uses APIs, SDKs, or plugins.
required_path.observable_result: rzp_test_ keys are available to the integration.

required_path.action: Complete the selected product's Test Mode first transaction path.
required_path.observable_result: One simulated Test Mode transaction succeeds for the selected product.

prerequisites.description: Owner or Admin role is required to access API keys.

external_gates.description: KYC verification is required to unlock Live Mode, typically cited as 24-48 hours.

unavoidable_waits.description: KYC verification may take 24-48 hours before Live Mode unlocks.
Signup OTP or email verification waits may occur during account creation.

platform_outcomes.description: Razorpay allows Test Mode product use during KYC verification.
Dashboard generates Test Mode key pairs with secrets shown once.

excluded.item: Adding team members and webhook configuration
excluded.reason: Quickstart lists these as key Dashboard actions after product choice, not as the universal first-success terminal.

excluded.item: Live Mode activation and live keys
excluded.reason: Quickstart places Live Mode after KYC and thorough Test Mode testing.

sources.title: Standard Checkout integration steps
evidence_supported: One Payment Gateway web integration candidate

uncertainties.question: Which Razorpay product and integration method should represent the platform's universal first mile?
uncertainties.impact: No-code links, Standard Checkout, quick integration, plugins, and subscriptions change required actions and first-success signals.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Choose one bounded product and integration guide, then verify its complete Test Mode path from a fresh account.

uncertainties.question: Which regional and business-type onboarding branch should represent all developers?
uncertainties.impact: Registered versus unregistered KYC paths change required fields, documents, and waits before Dashboard use.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated walkthrough of the current signup and KYC forms for the selected business type and country.
